opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I was just sitting reading, and suddenly my heart felt like a machine gun in my chest, and I feel quite dizzy.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My heart has been racing really fast for over half an hour now and it won't settle down like it usually does, and I'm getting lightheaded.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on completely suddenly while I was sitting still reading
symptom_narrative.duration: more than 30 minutes and it still hasn't stopped
symptom_narrative.character: a very fast, steady, regular pounding — like a machine gun in my chest
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really frightening, my heart is going so fast I can feel it thumping
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: in the middle of my chest
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: started all at once and has been constant since
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far — normally these stop by themselves after a minute or two but this one won't
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it feels worse and I get more short of breath when I move around the apartment
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling lightheaded and a bit breathless, and I'm sweaty and anxious
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had short bursts of my heart racing like this maybe 3 or 4 times over the past year, but they always stopped quickly on their own
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm sitting down because I feel too dizzy and distressed to move around much

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: has been drinking several coffees today while studying
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; feeling increasingly anxious being on her own during this episode

objective_data_offered.value: my smartwatch says my heart rate is about 180
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: consumer smartwatch reading during a very fast rhythm and motion — may be inaccurate and cannot show the heart's electrical pattern

objective_data_offered.value: I'm sweaty and clammy and my hands are a bit shaky, but I'm fully awake and talking to you
